zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Bestney II於1477年出生在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲時，他的父親James Bestney24歲，母親Mrs. James Bestney22歲。他於1497年之前與Eleanor Spendlove在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1553年在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾索韓姆享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Bestney II于1477年出生在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲时，他的父亲James Bestney24岁，母亲Mrs. James Bestney22岁。他于1497年之前与Eleanor Spendlove在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1553年在英国英格兰坎布利其爾索韓姆享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bestney
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Westan-ig, from westan, west, and ig, an island, meaning a Western island

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Bestney II was born in 1477, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, his father, James Bestney, was 24 and his mother, Mrs. James Bestney, was 22. He married Eleanor Spendlove before 1497, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died in 1553, in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Bestney II est né en 1477, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, James Bestney, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mrs. James Bestney, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Spendlove avant 1497, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1553, à Soham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Bestney II 1477 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Bestney 24 und seine Mutter Mrs. James Bestney 22. Er hat vor 1497 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England Eleanor Spendlove geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb 1553 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Bestney II è nato il nel 1477 nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, James Bestney, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. James Bestney, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Spendlove prima del 1497, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì nel 1553, nel Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Bestney IIが1477年にイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで生まれた時，父James Bestneyは24歳，母Mrs. James Bestneyは22歳であった。1497年以前にイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズでEleanor Spendloveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1553年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアソハムで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Bestney II(이)가 1477년 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Bestney(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. James Bestney(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1497년 이전 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 Eleanor Spendlove(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1553년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 소함에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Bestney II nasceu em 1477, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Bestney, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. James Bestney, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Spendlove antes 1497, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1553, em Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Bestney II родился в 1477 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени James Bestney было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. James Bestney, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Spendlove перед 1497 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер в 1553 г. в местности сохам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Bestney II nació en 1477, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, James Bestney, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mrs. James Bestney, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Eleanor Spendlove antes de 1497, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió en 1553, en Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
